---
title: "	 The Book of Days: A Miscellany of Popular Antiquities in Connection with the Calendar"
---

## 	 The Book of Days: A Miscellany of Popular Antiquities in Connection with the Calendar

**Author:** Robert Chambers
**Date:** 1862-1864
**Imprint:** London and Edinburgh: Chambers

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
